heading: Penalty for failure to give bond and for embezzlement
label: 4199 Penalty for failure to give bond and for embezzlement
text: Every consular officer who accepts any appointment to any office of trust mentioned in without first having complied with the provisions thereof by due execution of a bond as therein required, or who shall willfully fail or neglect to account for, pay over, and deliver any money, property, or effects so received to any person lawfully entitled thereto, after having been requested by the latter, his representative or agent so to do, shall be deemed guilty of embezzlement and shall be punishable by imprisonment for not more than five years and by a fine of not more than $5,000.section 4198 of this title
